iris.name: Iris
iris.description: Classic dataset with measurements of iris flowers from three species. Great for beginners.

wine.name: Wine
wine.description: Chemical analysis of wines from three Italian cultivars. Good for multi-class classification.

breast_cancer.name: Breast Cancer
breast_cancer.description: Diagnostic features of breast mass cell nuclei. Binary classification: malignant vs benign.

digits.name: Digits
digits.description: 8x8 pixel images of handwritten digits (0–9). Good for multi-class classification.

iris_clustering.name: Iris (Clustering)
iris_clustering.description: Iris dataset without labels — use for K-Means clustering experiments.

customer_segmentation.name: Customer Segmentation
customer_segmentation.description: Synthetic customer data for market segmentation with 3 natural clusters.
